name: Skillet Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Melt margarine in a large frying pan. Add the chopped dates, sugar, and eggs. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until a ball forms, about 5-8 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Stir in the crispy rice cereal and chopped nuts until well combined. Sprinkle confectioner's sugar on wax paper. Shape the mixture into two logs, each about 2 inches in diameter. Roll the logs in confectioner's sugar, then wrap in wax paper. Chill for at least an hour before slicing to serve. The skillet cookies can also be frozen by wrapping the chilled logs in foil after chilling.
NOTES: These are very easy and delicious treats that can be given as gifts wrapped in a log with instructions on how to slice and enjoy.
